subject: Probopass, a large rocky-faced Pokemon with a prominent mustache-like appendage and three small satellite mini-units flanking its main body, surrounded by magnetic or electric energy
description: A large rocky creature with a wide flat face, deep-set eyes, and a broad red nose dominates the composition. Its most distinctive feature is the thick dark horizontal mustache-like protrusion beneath the nose. Three small red-nosed satellite units (Mini-Noses) orbit the main body, crackling with yellowish-green electric or magnetic energy arcs. The background is dark and rocky, suggesting a cave or underground environment. The overall impression is of a powerful, magnetically-charged rock formation with a vaguely pompous or self-important bearing.
foreground: Probopass with three Mini-Nose satellite units, magnetic energy arcs
